prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Ford 427 FE (Side-Oiler) block (FE-SO)** with forged internals: Manley 4340 forged crankshaft (3.784" stroke), Eagle H-beam connecting rods (6.480" length), and JE forged pistons (12.5:1 compression ratio) for 600+ HP on 110-octane race fuel. Pair with a **Holley Dominator 1150 CFM carburetor** and **Edelbrock Victor Jr. intake manifold** for optimized airflow.

Forced induction via **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger** (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV**. Custom 3" stainless steel exhaust with **Flowmaster Super 44 mufflers** (straight-through design) and **Doug Thorley 1.75" primary headers** for maximum scavenging.

Suspension overhaul with **Detroit Speed QUADRALINK rear suspension** (4-link setup with adjustable panhard bar) and **AFCO 2.5" coilovers** (double-adjustable shocks with 400 lb/in springs). Front end reinforced with **Global West tubular upper/lower control arms** and **Moog Problem Solver ball joints** for precise geometry under hard launches.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated brake ducts, and aggressive rear overfenders) to fit **Forgeline GA3R 18x10" wheels** (ET15 offset) wrapped in **Hoosier R7 slicks (295/40/18)** for drag strip use.

Custom **PPG Ford Wimbledon White paint** with **House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red** scallops and **3M Matte Black vinyl** roof wrap. **Dynacorn 1964 Fairlane Thunderbolt reproduction badges** (polished aluminum) and **LED taillights** (replicating the original design but with modern illumination).

Interior stripped and reinforced with a **Rollcage Customs 8-point chromoly cage** (NHRA-certified) and **Sparco Pro 2000 seats** (fixed-back, FIA-approved). **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (3-spoke, 13" diameter) with a **QuickTime bellhousing** and **Tilton 7.25" triple-disc clutch** for drivetrain durability.
